rationale.D1: Confirmed a full CatzAbstractions library (GenericMotorIO, GenericIOSim backed by DCMotorSim, ServoMotorSubsystem, FlywheelMotorSubsystem) that every mechanism reuses as a parameterized base — library-grade abstraction, not repeated per-mechanism.
rationale.D2: CatzSuperstructure is a real goal-fanout coordinator (confirmed: fans robot-wide goals to turret, flywheel, hood, spindexer, ydexer, climb with intent/standby separation), but state transitions are boolean flags and method dispatch rather than guarded FSM transitions.
rationale.D3: Confirmed REAL/SIM/REPLAY run modes wired in Robot.java with WPILOGReader for replay; GenericIOSim uses DCMotorSim physics for all mechanism sims; ModuleIOSim uses DCMotorSim for drivetrain; ModuleIONull null-object for replay — whole-robot sim/replay workflow.
rationale.D4: No src/test directory exists and no test files found anywhere in the repo — zero testing despite a world-class sim layer.
rationale.D5: Confirmed AdvantageKit Logger.processInputs called for every subsystem via GenericMotorSubsystem.periodic() base class, Logger.recordOutput throughout CatzRobotTracker and CatzSuperstructure, @AutoLogOutput on pose fields — full-match AK coverage.
rationale.D6: Confirmed 58 Choreo .traj files under src/main/deploy/choreo, AutoFactory wired in CatzSuperstructure constructor, AutoRoutineBase uses choreo.auto.AutoRoutine/AutoTrajectory for trajectory following, multiple named auto routines confirmed active.
rationale.D7: Confirmed dedicated CatzRobotTracker with TimeInterpolatableBuffer, custom Kalman filter vision fusion via addVisionObservation, ApriltagScanningIO interface with Limelight impl feeding timestamped pose observations with distance-scaled std-devs — world-model architecture.
rationale.D8: GitHub Actions CI confirmed (build.yml runs spotlessApply + spotlessCheck + build on push/PR), spotless formatter configured in build.gradle, but README is 2 lines with no build/deploy instructions and no team library repo across seasons.
